display_text: What is your organisation's role in relation to this AI system? Select the single role that applies most directly to you.
hint_text: You may occupy more than one role simultaneously (Recital 87). If so, complete this assessment once per role. Provider: develops or places the AI system on the market under their own name (Article 3(3)). Deployer: uses the system under their own authority but did not develop it (Article 3(4)). All providers and deployers, regardless of risk level, must meet the AI literacy obligation under Article 4.

options.label: Provider — I develop, or have developed, this AI system and place it on the market or put it into service under my own name or trademark
Deployer — I use this AI system under my own authority in products, services, or processes (excluding purely personal non-professional use)
Distributor — I supply or resell this AI system on the EU market but I did not develop or substantially modify it
Importer — I bring this AI system into the EU from a provider established outside the EU
Product Manufacturer — I manufacture a physical product and want to embed this AI system into it under my own name
Authorised Representative — I am formally appointed in writing by a non-EU provider to act on their behalf in the EU
